heading: COMPOSITION OF THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY
label: 807 COMPOSITION OF THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 807, consisting of sections 8061 to 8084, related to the Air Force, prior to renumbering as chapter 907 of this title.
